heading: Feral horses and burros: removal from military installations
label: 2678 Feral horses and burros: removal from military installations
text: When feral horses or burros are found on an installation under the jurisdiction of the Secretary of a military department, the Secretary may use helicopters and motorized equipment for their removal.
